setlist.info: There was a 40 minute delay after "Lyla" due to a technical problem, and the audience was offered a full refund.
"Everybody's on the Run", "Half the World Away", "Live Forever", "Gas Panic!", "My Big Mouth", "Roll with It", and "Waiting for the Rapture" were all soundchecked before the show.
"To Be Where There's Life", "Waiting for the Rapture", "My Big Mouth", "Live Forever", "Roll With It", "Half the World Away", and "Gas Panic!" were all soundchecked before the show.

venue.name: Estadio de Fútbol de la Universidad Simón Bolívar

setlist.info: Oasis’ first gig in Africa as part of the Coca-Cola Zero Fest

"A Simple Game of Genius", "My Big Mouth", "To Be Where There's Life", "Waiting for the Rapture", "The Shock of the Lightning", "The Turning", and "Stop the Clocks" were all soundchecked before the show.
The song "If I Had a Gun..." by Noel Gallagher's High Flying Birds was soundchecked before the show.
